title: Two-pass PDF triage — smart page selection for vision analysis
what_failed: analyze_document_with_vision only analyzed page 1 visually, missing charts/figures on other pages.
fix_applied: tools/tools_media.py: new analyze_document_smart() method. Pass 1: scan all pages scoring by image count + inverse text density. Pass 2: render top-N (default 5) highest-scoring pages as PNG, send to Claude vision. Returns combined text+vision_analysis result with vision_pages list showing which pages were analyzed.
